$comment: Default metadata for build.sh — edit here instead of answering prompts.
If this file is present the build uses it and asks nothing; delete or rename
it to get the interactive questions back.
License: OFL-1.1, which is what Google Fonts requires (it accepts only
OFL-1.1 / Apache-2.0 / UFL — not MIT, not Creative Commons). OFL allows
donations, sponsorship and bundling; the one thing it forbids is selling the
font on its own. Shipping OFL also requires an OFL.txt next to the fonts.
copyright -> name ID 0   (the notice; Google Fonts wants this exact shape)
No version here on purpose: the version bump is a per-release decision, so
license: This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1. This license is available with a FAQ at https://openfontlicense.org
